notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, shields, waves, lives) but aliens render as plain rectangles with no sprite detail, no UFO/mystery ship, no alien animation toggling visually, and the shield arch logic is inverted (bottom cutout instead of top arch).
Solid core mechanics and controls, but visually basic (uses solid rectangles instead of alien sprites) and suffers from a frame-rate dependent game loop and unoptimized shield rendering.
Core loop and controls exist, but rendering can crash on the title screen because shields are drawn before initialization and the presentation is only a crude approximation of Space Invaders.
